title: Stree
tmdbOverview: Set in the town of Chanderi, Stree is based on the urban legend of Nale Ba that went viral in Karnataka in the 1990s, and features Shraddha Kapoor and Rajkummar Rao in pivotal roles.
synopsis: Stree is a 2018 horror and comedy film from India. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
